title: Crispy Greek Date-Muffin Sandwich
description: A grassy and crispy date-night dish featuring English muffins with a touch of bain-marie for added texture and Buddhist temple-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil or Avocado Oil for brushing

instructions: Place dates in a single layer on baking sheet, brush with warm honey and sprinkle with almond meal. Bake until caramelized, about 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast English muffins by lightly brushing with oil and placing under broiler for 2 minutes on each side.
Spoon yogurt over toasted muffin halves.
Arrange cooked dates in sandwich circles between two slices of toasted muffin. Drizzle with warm honey and gently press to adhere.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh mint leaves if desired.
